{{Quote|If you insist on following that hokey religion, there's a guy named Nos'lyn you should meet. He's probably meditating in the Close Combat Training Room.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|audio=vo-han-solo-20c.flac|<ref name="SWG:YNW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|You Need Work|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
'''Nos'lyn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who managed to escape the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. As of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], he could be found hiding out at the [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|It is time to acquire a weapon unique to those steeped in the Force.|Nos'lyn|<ref name="DS">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Dark Side scenario campaign}}</ref>}}
While on the station, Nos'lyn met with young [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individuals and asked them to perform some tasks that allowed them to become attuned to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. One task in particular required the individuals to calm an angry [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] guard who was grieving the [[Death/Legends|death]] of his sister. A young hopeful seeking to follow the light [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] path skillfully managed to convince the guard that violence would be unnecessary and serve to accomplish nothing but more pain and suffering for all. Upon successful completion of the tasks, Nos'lyn gave the individuals some old [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] robes and an Auric bracelet. Another [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]] that had malicious intentions tried to convince the guard to seek out violent revenge. This individual was reprimanded by Nos'lyn.<ref name="SWG:LtWotF">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Jedi|Learning the Ways of the Force|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

[[File:Noslyn.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Nos'lyn]]
He would later contact each Jedi hopeful, once they had undergone some training and discovered a [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]], in order to instruct them in the ways of the [[Living Force/Legends|Living Force]]. He instructed the individual to head out into the [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and to meditate at a [[Oasis (Force nexus)|Force oasis]]. The place was full of the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side of the Force]], so strongly that even the local animals could feel its power. Immediately after the individual had done this, Nos'lyn informed them of a ruined [[Unidentified Tusken village/Legends|Tusken village]], which was full of a nearly-palpable anger. He told them that nobody had ever returned to settle there, and instructed them to go there. As soon as the Jedi hopeful arrived at the village, Nos'lyn spoke to them once more through the Force; he informed them that a [[Mission to rescue Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|deep act of anger]] took place there years previously, which caused the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] to twist the animals in the area. He asked the Jedi hopeful to put these animals out of their misery, but not in a spirit of anger. Once the Jedi hopeful performed these tasks, Nos'lyn contacted them once more and informed them that they did well and that he was hopeful that they saw the significance of what the Force can do. Their next task was to travel to [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] to acquire a gift from [[Sol Windtide]], an old friend of Nos'lyn, that he had left for the hopeful: 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and a [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]].<ref name="SWG:AaH">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Jedi|First Steps: Anger and Harmony|Tatooine}}</ref>

This was not the last time that Nos'lyn would contact the individual; he did so once more after they had undergone further training and acquired a [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]]. This time, he informed the hopeful that it was time for them to acquire the weapon of a Jedi, their first [[Training lightsaber/Legends|training lightsaber]]. The prospective Jedi was ordered to go to a [[Crystal Cave (Naboo)|cave]] on the planet of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in order to find a lightsaber crystal. This cave was infested by [[Narglatch/Legends|Narglatch]], but the supplicant managed to make their way through and acquired three crystals from the glowing crystalline structures inside. Unfortunately the individual was informed by Nos'lyn that none of these crystals were for them, and that they should search their feelings to find their own crystal. Once the Jedi hopeful found this crystal, they were contacted once again by Nos'lyn, who told them to keep it safe and hidden as they would need to tune it before it could be used in their lightsaber. He then informed them to return to Bestine and meet with Sol Windtide who would give them their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="SWG:SfaJW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Jedi|Searching for a Jedi's Weapon|Naboo}}</ref>

Sometime afterward, an agent of [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] came to Nos'lyn looking for help. The agent needed a [[Krayt dragon pearl/Legends|Krayt dragon pearl]] polished for a prototype asteroid-moving [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. Nos'lyn was found in a remote corner of the station, on a lower level, and initially refused to take the job. When the agent pointed the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] at him, Nos'lyn tried to [[Mind trick/Legends#Force persuasion|Force Persuade]] him, but failed. He ignited his lightsaber preparing to defend himself, but the agent came prepared and found a way to inflict pain to the man. Asking to stop the torture, Nos'lyn agreed to take the job and spend the next couple of days polishing the pearl, while being guarded by the agent. After the job was completed the agent left; since he was more interested in the superweapon than hunting down Jedi, he didn't bother to report about Nos'lyn to his superiors.<ref name="DS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nos'lyn appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:FST" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Nos'lyn was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]", introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]", a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> His role was to train Jedi-class players.<ref name="SWG:FST" />
